title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. dalmaticum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. dalmaticum, also known as Dalmatian hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. dalmaticum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. dalmaticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
